description: to validate the URLs, token, and connection.
examples:
Command Example
!ua-parse UserAgent="Mozilla/5.0 (Macintosh; Intel Mac OS X 10_14_2) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/72.0.3626.96 Safari/537.36"
Context Example
{
"DBotScore": {
"Vendor": "WhatIsMyBrowser",
"Indicator": "Mozilla/5.0 (Macintosh; Intel Mac OS X 10_14_2) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/72.0.3626.96 Safari/537.36",
"Score": 1,

!ua-parse UserAgent="Mozilla/5.0 (Macintosh; Intel Mac OS X 10_14_2) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/72.0.3626.96 Safari/537.36"

"Score": 1,
"Type": "UserAgent"
name: ua-parse

outputs.description: Software extracted from UA string. UA.Parse.SoftwareName Software Name extracted from UA string.
outputs.name: UA.Parse.Software

outputs.description: Operating System extracted from UA string. UA.Parse.Abusive Whether or not the UA has been identified as abusive.
outputs.name: UA.Parse.OperatingSystem

outputs.description: Operating System Name extracted from UA string. UA.Parse.UserAgent User agent string.
outputs.name: UA.Parse.OperatingSystemName

outputs.description: Hardware Type as extracted from UA string. UA.Parse.HardwareSubType Hardware Sub Type as extracted from UA string.
outputs.name: UA.Parse.HardwareType
